title: HEK3/LINC01509 Library Preparation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8p3aj","text":"Library preparation for HEK3 recording site (LINC01509) using PCR and digestion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"104bu","text":"NGS primer F (\"CTGGCCTGGGTCAATCCTTG\")","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cjv4e","text":"NGS primer R (\"CCCAGCCAAACTTGTCAACC\")","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"42iag","text":"Q5 HiFi polymerase 2X master mix (NEB)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2qoip","text":"BccI (NEB)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"873nh","text":"LMW agarose","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqkvf","text":"SYBR Safe gel stain","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71qt5","text":"Generuler 1kb PLUS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6g7s3","text":"SPRI beads (Nucleomag)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make up 1:50 Thermolabile Proteinase K (NEB) in Viagen (cell).
Resuspend cells in 25 µL of Viagen/Proteinase K. Quickly transfer cells into a PCR strip to avoid viscosity.
Perform lysis in a PCR machine: 37 °C 01:00:00 55 °C 00:30:00 On ice Store lysates at -20 °C in the pre-PCR freezer.
Make up a 100 µL PCR reaction per sample (Q5) using 10 µL of cell lysate.
Purify amplicons by 1X SPRI bead cleanup, eluting in 10 µL of water.
Digest zero-length recordings with 5 µL BccI in 50 uL volume: 37 °C 01:00:00 65 °C 00:20:00 On ice
Perform gel electrophoresis in 4% LMP agarose at 3 V/cm for 01:00:00 .
Using 1 µL of gel product, perform indexing PCR in 12 µL volume with Nextera primers .
Extract the region from 300 bp to 500 bp and elute in 12 µL of water. Store gel products at -20 °C in the post-PCR freezer.
Purify amplicons by 1X SPRI bead cleanup, eluting in 10 µL of water.
Take 1 µL of each indexed amplicon to D1000 Tapescreen. Recordings should be above 158 + 67 (adaptors) + 69 (indexes) = 294 bp .
Pool indexed amplicons according to desired relative molarities for sequencing.
go to step #4.2
